fields.Name: MJ to MJ
fields.Description: Read-only connector that pulls conversational data (Conversations, Conversation Details, optional AI Agent Runs/Steps) from a remote MemberJunction instance via its GraphQL API. Maps to MJ: Conversations and MJ: Conversation Details. Every MJ deploymen...

fields.Name: Conversations
fields.Description: MJ Conversations on the remote instance — chat sessions. Maps directly to MJ: Conversations on the destination side. Watermark on __mj_UpdatedAt. GraphQL query name is 'Conversations' (plural), filtered via MJ's ExtraFilter SQL WHERE string convention.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ primary key for the Conversation. Maps to MJ: Conversations.ExternalID on the destination side.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Conversation title/topic. Maps to MJ: Conversations.Name.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: Long-form description of the conversation.

fields.Name: UserID
fields.Description: FK to Users — the owner of the conversation on the remote instance.

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: External identifier from yet another system (if the remote MJ was itself syncing conversations from elsewhere). Not used for mapping on the destination side.

fields.Name: DataContextID
fields.Description: FK to MJ: Data Contexts (on remote). Typically not synced across instances — data contexts are per-environment.

fields.Name: Type
fields.Description: Conversation type (Skip, Support, Chat, etc.). Maps to MJ: Conversations.Type.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Processing status on the remote MJ: Available / Processing. Maps to MJ: Conversations.Status.

fields.Name: LinkedEntityID
fields.Description: FK to MJ: Entities on remote — if the conversation is linked to a specific entity type.

fields.Name: LinkedRecordID
fields.Description: ID of a related record the conversation pertains to (ticket, order, etc.).

fields.Name: IsArchived
fields.Description: True if archived on the remote MJ — consider filtering these out at mapping time.

fields.Name: IsPinned
fields.Description: True if pinned on the remote MJ UI.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on the remote MJ (BaseEntity field).

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on the remote MJ — used as the incremental-sync watermark.

fields.Name: ConversationDetails
fields.Description: Individual messages inside a remote MJ Conversation — one row per user/AI turn. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details. Watermark on __mj_UpdatedAt. Filter by ConversationID at mapping time to thread messages under the right parent conversation.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ primary key for the Conversation Detail. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details.ExternalID on the destination side.

fields.Name: ConversationID
fields.Description: FK to Conversations.ID on remote. Maps at sync time to the local MJ: Conversations.ID by joining on the synced ExternalID.

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: External identifier from yet another system (rarely used).

fields.Name: Role
fields.Description: Message role: AI / Error / User. Maps directly to MJ: Conversation Details.Role.

fields.Name: Message
fields.Description: Message body text. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details.Message.

fields.Name: Error
fields.Description: Error text if this turn failed. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details.Error.

fields.Name: HiddenToUser
fields.Description: True for system / function / tool-call messages the user never saw. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details.HiddenToUser.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Processing status of the message: Complete / In-Progress / Error. Maps to MJ: Conversation Details.Status.

fields.Name: UserID
fields.Description: Optional override user for this message (normally derived from the parent conversation).

fields.Name: AgentID
fields.Description: FK to AIAgents on remote — denormalized agent identifier for quick display.

fields.Name: CompletionTime
fields.Description: Duration in milliseconds for the AI response at this turn.

fields.Name: ParentID
fields.Description: FK to ConversationDetails.ID on remote for threaded messages. NULL for top-level messages.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on remote — incremental-sync watermark.

fields.Name: AIAgents
fields.Description: Reference data for agent definitions on the remote MJ — used to resolve AgentID references on Conversation Details. Read-only; typically small list. Not synced to a destination entity by default.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ AI Agent primary key.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Agent name (e.g., 'Skip', 'Sage').

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: Agent description.

fields.Name: ParentID
fields.Description: FK to AIAgents — parent in the agent hierarchy. NULL for root agents.

fields.Name: TypeID
fields.Description: FK to MJ: AI Agent Types on remote (Loop, etc.).

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Agent status on remote: Active / Disabled / Pending.

fields.Name: ExposeAsAction
fields.Description: Whether the agent can be invoked as an action by other agents.

fields.Name: LogoURL
fields.Description: Agent logo URL or data URI.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on remote — watermark candidate.

fields.Name: AIAgentRuns
fields.Description: Execution logs for agent runs on the remote MJ. Inactive by default — enable on CompanyIntegrationObject if the customer wants run-level telemetry. GraphQL query name escapes 'MJ: AI Agent Runs' to 'MJ_AIAgentRuns'. Watermark on __mj_UpdatedAt.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ Agent Run primary key.

fields.Name: AgentID
fields.Description: FK to AIAgents.

fields.Name: ParentRunID
fields.Description: Parent agent run for sub-agent execution hierarchies.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Run status: Running / Completed / Failed / Cancelled / Paused / AwaitingFeedback.

fields.Name: StartedAt
fields.Description: Timestamp when the agent run began.

fields.Name: CompletedAt
fields.Description: Timestamp when the agent run completed. NULL for active runs.

fields.Name: Success
fields.Description: True/False once complete; NULL while running.

fields.Name: ErrorMessage
fields.Description: Failure message if the run did not succeed.

fields.Name: ConversationID
fields.Description: FK to Conversations on remote — ties the run to a chat session.

fields.Name: UserID
fields.Description: FK to Users on remote — who triggered the run.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: Final agent result (JSON or text).

fields.Name: TotalTokensUsed
fields.Description: Total LLM tokens consumed by this run.

fields.Name: TotalCost
fields.Description: Estimated cost for this agent run.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on remote — watermark.

fields.Name: AIAgentRunSteps
fields.Description: Step-level detail within an AI Agent Run on the remote MJ. Inactive by default — enable when detailed run telemetry is needed. GraphQL query name escapes 'MJ: AI Agent Run Steps' to 'MJ_AIAgentRunSteps'. Watermark on __mj_UpdatedAt. Parent-child of AIAgentRuns via AgentRunID.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ Agent Run Step primary key.

fields.Name: AgentRunID
fields.Description: FK to AIAgentRuns — the parent run this step belongs to.

fields.Name: StepNumber
fields.Description: 1-based sequential step number within the run.

fields.Name: StepType
fields.Description: One of: Actions, Chat, Decision, ForEach, Prompt, Sub-Agent, Validation, While.

fields.Name: StepName
fields.Description: Human-readable label for the step.

fields.Name: TargetID
fields.Description: Polymorphic FK to the target (AIPrompt, AIAction, AIAgent, etc.).

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Running / Completed / Failed / Cancelled.

fields.Name: StartedAt
fields.Description: Timestamp when the step began.

fields.Name: CompletedAt
fields.Description: Timestamp when the step finished.

fields.Name: Success
fields.Description: True/False when complete.

fields.Name: ErrorMessage
fields.Description: Failure message if the step failed.

fields.Name: InputData
fields.Description: JSON serialization of the step input.

fields.Name: OutputData
fields.Description: JSON serialization of the step output.

fields.Name: ParentID
fields.Description: FK to AIAgentRunSteps for hierarchical step relationships.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on remote — watermark.

fields.Name: Users
fields.Description: Read-only reference list of Users on the remote MJ — used to resolve UserID on Conversations and Conversation Details. Not synced to a destination entity by default; typically a small list.

fields.Name: ID
fields.Description: Remote MJ User primary key.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Full name or account name.

fields.Name: FirstName
fields.Description: User first name.

fields.Name: LastName
fields.Description: User last name.

fields.Name: Email
fields.Description: User email (unique on remote).

fields.Name: Title
fields.Description: User title or salutation.

fields.Name: Type
fields.Description: User account type — Owner or User on remote.

fields.Name: IsActive
fields.Description: Whether the user account is active on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_CreatedAt
fields.Description: Row creation timestamp on remote.

fields.Name: __mj_UpdatedAt
fields.Description: Last modification timestamp on remote — watermark.
